0:
Haermaga wishes to shower you with praise, while R'fhul Tia prepares to tackle the obstacle course.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

Haermaga wishes to shower you with praise, while R'fhul Tia prepares to tackle the obstacle course.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Following your emphatic conquest of the Eorzean Nimble Warrior course, you return to Haermaga to share the good news. In light of your inspirational display, R'fhul Tia eagerly prepares for his own attempt. R'majha races ahead to find a spot from which the two of you can watch her brother's acrobatics.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.
